summary: Patrick McKenzie announces he is attending the Software Industry Conference in Dallas, where he will present on SEO strategies. He invites attendees to connect with him at the Hyatt Regency. He promises to share the presentation materials and written elaboration after delivering the talk, though he's unsure if video will be recorded.
key_points: McKenzie is speaking at the Software Industry Conference on SEO strategies
He actively encourages in-person networking with conference attendees
He commits to publishing presentation materials and elaboration after the talk
money_quotes: I'll be giving a presentation about SEO strategies on Saturday.
I'll be posting the presentation and some textual elaboration on it right after I finish delivering it.
key_insight: McKenzie leveraged his blog audience to build connections at industry events while committing to share knowledge publicly after presenting.
